name: Wand of Web
description:
This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast {@spell Web|XPHB} (save {@dc 13}) from it.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Regaining Charges", "entries": ["The wand regains {@dice 1d6 + 1} expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the wand's last charge, roll {@dice 1d20}. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed."]}
